title: stevia orizabensis
intro: Stevia orizabensis is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family, Asteraceae, native to the cloud forests of Mexico. Stevia orizabensis is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is rich in steviol glycosides, compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving oral health. Stevia orizabensis can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
